title: Instructing Police Station Cover at North Kent (Gravesend) Custody
primaryKeyword: instruct police station cover North Kent Gravesend
metaTitle: Instruct Cover at North Kent Gravesend Custody
metaDescription: How criminal defence firms instruct police station cover at North Kent (Gravesend) custody — client details, custody record and DSCC references.
featuredImageAlt: Instructing cover at North Kent custody
contentHtml:
In brief

Firms instructing cover at North Kent (Gravesend) custody should provide client identity, Thames Way custody confirmation, custody record number, DSCC reference where available, and a call-back contact.

North Kent custody suite

The suite at Thames Way, Northfleet (DA11 8BD) is a 24-hour facility covering north Kent including Gravesend, Dartford and surrounding areas. Attendance times depend on demand and availability.

Instruction checklist

  • Client name and date of birth
  • Confirm North Kent (Gravesend) custody
  • Custody record number
  • DSCC reference if allocated
  • Offence summary and any disclosure received
  • Firm name and billing reference

Further reading

See DSCC and custody record support, police station cover for solicitors, and North Kent cover page.

General information only.

faq.q: How do firms instruct urgent cover at Gravesend custody?
faq.a: Telephone for urgent custody matters. Include client details, station, custody record number and DSCC reference where available.

author: Robert Cashman
